{{Quote|We are a division of the Imperial Navy, but no record in the Imperial Archive on Coruscant would indicate our existence. We serve the will of the Emperor directly and silently. When political necessity requires a war, we create war. When it requires peace, we silence those who oppose peace.|[[Hakasha Sireen]]|<ref name="SWG:JtL">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]''</ref>}}
[[File:BlackEpsilonBadge.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The Black Epsilon Ace Pilot Badge.]]
'''Black Epsilon''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] that performed covert tasks that were too sensitive, or too small for the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] to handle. Black Epsilon answered directly to [[Palpatine/Legends|the Emperor]]. It was one of the few Imperial units that made use of a large number of non-Humans.

{{Military-stub}}
